items.question: What is the average duration of a project?
items.answer: It depends on complexity: 1 to 2 weeks for a showcase site, 3 to 6 weeks for an e-commerce, 2 to 4 months for a custom application.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?
items.answer: I work until your complete satisfaction. If something isn't right, I make the necessary improvements until you are fully happy. This is why my clients are very positive about my work.

items.question: Do you offer post-delivery support?
items.answer: Yes, one month of support is included after launch. Maintenance packages are also available.

items.question: Can I modify the project along the way?
items.answer: Absolutely! We work in stages with regular validations to adjust as closely as possible to your needs.

items.question: Are the displayed prices final?
items.answer: They are indicative bases. Each project is unique, so I provide a personalized quote after understanding your needs.

items.question: How does the initial consultation work?
items.answer: It is free and lasts about 30 minutes. It's an opportunity to discuss your goals, your ideas, and see if we are on the same page before starting the actual work.

cta.title: Can't find what you're looking for?

disclaimer: * Prices are indicative. Each project receives a personalized quote.
